${TITLE}

Internal ad-hoc build · tap Install to add it to your iPhone.

Open this page in Safari. iOS only allows over-the-air installs to start from Safari. If you opened this from Slack, Asana, Mail, or another app, tap and hold the link, choose “Open in Safari”, then tap Install there.
Version${BUNDLE_VERSION} (${BUILD_NUMBER})
Build type${BUILD_TYPE}
Bundle ID${BUNDLE_ID}
Commit${COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
Built${BUILD_TIMESTAMP}
Install on iPhone

Your device’s UDID must already be registered in the DuckDuckGo iOS provisioning profile. If install fails with “Unable to install,” that’s the most likely reason.
